daily_take.deck: Pittsburgh dropped 15 points overnight on a single loss, sliding to 34.5%. The market panicked. But Vegas hasn't moved that much and the underlying team quality hasn't changed. Sharp money sees a contrarian entry here, especially at a line that now prices in a Pittsburgh collapse that hasn't actually happened yet.
